lead: This machine uses normal, tenkoku, and reset. Pick the current route first, then use the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Keep normal, tenkoku, and reset on separate lines.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: Use the tenkoku line only when it matches the current state.

factTable: Judge after the route is identified.
Do not mix normal and tenkoku.

sections.title: How to use
body: The selected route changes the checker output.
Use the matching route first, then compare the result card and the summary table.

sections.title: Memo
body: When the current state is vague, stay on the safer line.
This page follows the current checker structure.
